runTitle: AI Engine Provider Fallback and DISK Threshold Regression Fix

environment.backend: Cloud Run AI Engine local test suite

coveredSurfaces: AI SDK nested retry disabled for provider-managed fallback paths
Streaming agent empty tool-result summarization delegates to next provider
Whitespace-only stream chunks do not count as delivered text
DISK >=70% metric threshold answers use deterministic server metrics output for Analyst/NLQ paths
skippedSurfaces: Vercel production browser recheck - requires Cloud Run deployment of this local fix
Cloud Tasks high-volume load test - intentionally skipped to preserve free-tier budget

completedImprovements.title: AI async job answer should preserve DISK >=70% threshold and dashboard metric values
completedImprovements.evidence: Added deterministic DISK threshold ranking for Analyst/NLQ metric queries and covered it with orchestrator-summary-fallback regression tests.
completedImprovements.note: Production recheck still requires deploying the Cloud Run AI Engine fix.

completedImprovements.title: Cerebras queue_exceeded should not amplify retries before provider fallback
completedImprovements.evidence: Added retry-with-fallback and streaming-agent regression tests verifying maxRetries=0 and fallback to next provider on 429/queue_exceeded.
completedImprovements.note: Prevents the 3-attempt same-provider retry pattern observed in Cloud Run logs.

notes: Commands: cd cloud-run/ai-engine && npx vitest run src/services/ai-sdk/agents/orchestrator-agent-stream.test.ts src/services/ai-sdk/agents/orchestrator-summary-fallback.test.ts src/services/resilience/retry-with-fallback.test.ts
Commands: cd cloud-run/ai-engine && npm run type-check
Commands: cd cloud-run/ai-engine && npm run test
AI Engine test result: 87 files / 916 tests passed.
